rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: The Prayer of Athanasius for the Passing of the Soul
Prayer of supplication
The Book that Came from Jerusalem, መጽሐፍ፡ ዘወፅአት፡ እምኢየሩሳሌም፡
Funeral ritual when they came out of the church with the body, ወሶበ ይወፅኡ እምቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡
The Book that Came from Jerusalem, መጽሐፍ፡ ዘወፅአት፡ እምኢየሩሳሌም፡
Prayer of Our Lady Mary, ጸሎት፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡
Reading of admonition at the time of entombment, ተግሣጽ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ላዕለ፡ኵሎሙ፡ ምውታን፡ በጊዜ፡ ግንዘት፡
Prayer of Incense, at the church, ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን።. Published in Ethiopia, ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን። (Addis Ababa: Tǝnśa’e Zä-Guba’e, 1951 EC)
Funeral Ritual for Women who died during Passion Week, አርእስተ፡ ምንባብ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ላዕለ፡ ምውታን፡ ሶበ፡ ይመውታ፡ አንስት፡ በሰሙነ፡ ሕማማት፡
Funeral Ritual for men who died in the Passion Week, አርእስተ፡ ምንባብ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ሶበ፡ ይመውቱ፡ ዕደው፡ በሰሙነ፡ ሕማማት።
Funeral Ritual for Priests, መጽሐፈ፡ ግንዘት፡ በእንተ፡ አለ፡ኖሙ ካህናት፡
Funeral Ritual for Faithful Fathers, ግንዘት፡ ዘዲያቆናት፡
Funeral Ritual for Faithful Fathers, ግንዘት፡ ዘአበው፡ መሐይምናን፡
Funeral Ritual for Children, ግንዘት፡ ዘሕፃናት፡
Funeral Ritual for Women, ግንዘት፡ ዘዓበይት፡ አንስት፡
Funeral Ritual for Girls, ግንዘት፡ ዘአዋልድ፡ ንዑሳት፡
Funeral Ritual for Nuns, ንዘት፡ ዘመነኮሳይያት፡
Funeral Ritual for Monks, ግንዘት፡ ዘመነኮሳት፡
Funeral Ritual for Bishop, ግንዘት፡ ዘኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፡
Funeral Processional with Seven Stations
Station One, when you bring out the body from the home
Station Two
Station Three
Station Four
Station Five
Station Six, at the gate of the church
Station Seven, inside the church
Homily of Jacob of Sǝrug for Departed Priests and Deacons, ድርሳን፡ ዘብፁዕ፡ ወቅዱስ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ዘሥሩግ፡
Prayers:
First Prayer
Second Prayer
Third Prayer
Fourth Prayer
Five Prayers of Matthew, the Apostle
Prayer for all the departed, ጸሎት፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ሙታን፡
Funeral Ritual for all the departed, ጸሎተ፡ ፍትሐት፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ሙታን።
Homily on the departed bishops and order of the mourning of the priests, በእንተ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ እለ፡ ሞቱ፡ ሰቆቃወ ሥርዓት፡ ዘካህናት፡
Homily on the sinful woman who anointed the Lord Jesus with perfume, በእንተ፡ ኃጥእት፡ ብእሲት፡ ዘቀብዓቶ፡ ለእግዚእ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ዕፍረተ።
Funeral Ritual when the body is taken to the burial place
Homily about Burial, ድርሳን፡ በእንተ፡ ግብዓተ፡ መሬት፡
Homily of Abba Sälama, Bishop of Ethiopia, to be read for all the Dead
Prayer for the Dead, ጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡
Seven Benedictions of Abba Samuel, ጸሎተ፡ ቡራኬ፡ ዘአቡነ፡ ሳሙኤል፡
ካልዕ:
ሣልስ:
ራብዕ:
ሐምስ:
ሳድስ:
ሳብዕ:
Funeral Ritual for the Third Day after the Death, ዝንቱ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በሠለስቱ፡ ዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Seventh Day (after the Death), ዝንቱ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፯ቱዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Twelfth Day (after the Death) ዝንቱ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፲ወ፪ ዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Thirtieth Day (after the Death), ዝንቱ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ አመ፡ ፴ ዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Fortieth, Seventieth Days, the tenth Sabbath, Half a year, and a year, and all the memory of the Dead, ዝንቱ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፵ ዕለት፡ ወበ፸፡ ዕለት፡ ወበ፲ ሰንበት፡ ወበመንፈቅ፡ ወበዓመት፡ ወበኵሉ፡ ተዝካረ፡ ሙታን፡
Homily from One of the Brothers, ዜና፡ መፍትው፡ እምአኃው፡
Asmat Prayer of the Hebrew alphabet
Petition and Supplication, Sǝ’ǝlät wä-‘asǝtäbǝqwu‘ot, ስእለት፡ ወአስተብቍዖት፡
Prayer, “ O Lord have mercy on us.”
Selected biblical readings
Excerpt from School Chant called ‘ǝzl
